Industries We Serve

Specialized scrap management solutions built for every sector.

Factories & Manufacturing

Avg. ₹2.5L/month savings

Comprehensive factory scrap management — MS scrap, metal offcuts, copper cables, packaging waste, and more. Regular schedules, GST compliance, bulk pricing.

MS ScrapCopper CablesAluminium OffcutsPackaging WasteMachine Parts
Get Industry Quote

Hotels & Hospitality

Zero-waste certification

Hotel waste management including kitchen scrap, cardboard, glass, old furniture, linen, and electrical equipment disposal with proper documentation.

Kitchen WasteCardboardOld FurnitureElectronicsLinen
Get Industry Quote

Construction & Builders

Same-day site clearance

On-site collection for demolition and construction scrap — iron rods, electrical cables, aluminium fixtures, wood, and all building materials.

Iron RodsCopper WiringAluminium FixturesWoodBricks
Get Industry Quote

Warehouses & Logistics

Single-day clearance

Complete warehouse clearance — metal racks, packaging materials, old inventory, machines, and regular ongoing waste management programs.

Metal RacksPackagingOld InventoryEquipmentPallets
Get Industry Quote

Retail & Commercial

Bi-weekly schedules

Retail store and mall waste management including fixtures, electronics, cardboard, plastic packaging, signage, and display materials.

Store FixturesElectronicsCardboardPlasticSignage
Get Industry Quote

Hospitals & Healthcare

CPCB certified disposal

CPCB-compliant medical equipment disposal, e-waste recycling, metal scrap, and non-hazardous waste collection with proper certification.

Medical EquipmentElectronicsMetal ScrapCablesFurniture
Get Industry Quote

Auto & Engineering

Up to ₹8L/quarter

Automotive and engineering industry scrap — vehicle parts, metal components, cables, batteries, and manufacturing waste at best rates.

Vehicle PartsMetal ComponentsLead BatteriesCablesTools
Get Industry Quote

Educational Institutions

Campus sustainability

Schools, colleges, and universities — computer labs e-waste, old furniture, paper recycling programs, and campus sustainability initiatives.

ComputersLab EquipmentOld FurniturePaperCables
